docs.title: Welcome to MkDocs
docs.text: For full documentation visit mkdocs.org.

docs.title: Commands
docs.text:
• mkdocs new [dir-name] - Create a new project.
  • mkdocs serve - Start the live-reloading docs server.
  • mkdocs build - Build the documentation site.
  • mkdocs -h - Print help message and exit.

docs.title: Project layout
docs.text:
Text Only
mkdocs.yml    # The configuration file.
docs/
    index.md  # The documentation homepage.
    ...       # Other markdown pages, images and other files.

docs.title: Formatting
docs.text:
• Bold
  • Italic
  • Strikethrough
  • Underline
  • Text with suggested changes: high light
  • Text with suggested changes: added
  • Text with suggested changes: deleted
  • Text with suggested changes: combined into onea single operation
  • Text with suggested changes: comments
  • 上標: 30th
  • 下標: H2O
  • Keyboard keys: Ctrl+Alt+Del
  • → ← ↔ ≠ 1st 2nd 1/4

docs.title: Math block syntax
docs.text:
Blocks must be enclosed in $$...$$ or \[...\] on separate lines.

\[ \cos x=\sum_{k=0}^{\infty}\frac{(-1)^k}{(2k)!}x^{2k} \]
